chapter_title: Obedience to and Effect of Traffic Laws
text: A vehicle dealer, selling a low-speed vehicle, shall provide to the buyer a disclosure statement regarding the operation of the vehicle that is in compliance with existing provisions of the California Code of Regulations.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 11. RULES OF THE ROAD [21000 - 23336]
### Chapter 1. Obedience to and Effect of Traffic Laws [21000 - 21300]
#### Article 5.5. Operation of Low-Speed Vehicles [21250 - 21266]
##### § 21252

A vehicle dealer, selling a low-speed vehicle, shall provide to the buyer a disclosure statement regarding the operation of the vehicle that is in compliance with existing provisions of the California Code of Regulations.

*(Added by Stats. 1999, Ch. 140, Sec. 6. Effective January 1, 2000.)*
